11: Hypothesis 3: Embodiment and Physical World Interaction
12: This hypothesis foresees agents breaking free from their purely digital confines to
13: operate in the physical world. By integrating agentic AI with robotics, we will see the rise
14: of "embodied agents." Instead of just booking a handyman, you might ask your home
15: agent to fix a leaky tap. The agent would use its vision sensors to perceive the problem,
